primary_risks: Crypto flow, regulation, BTC/ETH sentiment, earnings gap risk

primary_risks: AI expectations, valuation, product cycle, competition with NVDA
notes: Often useful as a more explainable AI-theme anchor.

primary_risks: Dilution/financing, governance history, order-cycle risk, jump risk

primary_risks: AI capex cycle, valuation, export controls, crowded positioning
notes: Liquid and client-recognizable; coupon may be lower than SMCI/MSTR.

primary_risks: Deliveries, margins, valuation, CEO/event risk, China exposure
notes: Useful when client wants a familiar high-beta name.

primary_risks: Valuation, government/commercial growth, sentiment, earnings risk
Retail activity, crypto revenue, regulation, rate sensitivity
notes: Can pair with COIN for trading/crypto activity theme.

primary_risks: Storage cycle, post-separation trading history, idiosyncratic gap risk

primary_risks: AI capex, search/ads cycle, antitrust, valuation
